skipPayrollDialog.title: Skip payroll for {{payPeriod}}?
skipPayrollDialog.body: Before skipping this payroll, check your state's pay frequency laws. If you don't pay the team on time, it could lead to penalties or fines.

offCycleCta.title: Run an off-cycle payroll
offCycleCta.description: You can pay an employee outside of your normal payroll schedule by running an off-cycle payroll.
